title: Create: Break It All
description: C:BIA makes most non-natural blocks breakable with the wrench
body:
C:BIA is a datapack and mod that makes most non-natural blocks breakable with the Create mod wrench. Things like signs, workbenches, and redstone blocks are now able to be picked up with the wrench instead of having to pull out a pesky pickaxe!

<details>
<summary>List of now breakable blocks:</summary>

- Chains
- Chests
- Glass blocks
- Glass panes
- Furnaces
- Skulls
- Villager job sites
- Copper bulbs
- Froglights
- Lanterns
- Sculk shrieker
- Sculk sensors
- Torches
- Create windows
- Create seats
- Signs
- Hanging signs
- Anvils
- Banners
- Beds
- Buttons
- Campfires
- Candles
- Doors
- Fence gates
- Fences
- Flower pots
- Pressure plates
- Rails
- Shulker boxes
- Trapdoors
- Beacons
- Beehives
- Bells
- Bookshelves
- Chiseled bookshelves
- Conduits
- Crafters
- Crafting tables
- Daylight detectors
- Decorated pots
- Dispensers
- Dragon eggs
- Droppers
- Enchanting tables
- End rods
- Glowstone
- Heavy cores
- Honey blocks
- Hoppers
- Jukeboxes
- Ladders
- Levers
- Lightning rods
- Lodestones
- Note blocks
- Redstone blocks
- Redstone lamps
- Redstone wires
- Repeaters
- Respawn anchors
- Scaffolding
- Sea lanterns
- Shroomlights
- Slime blocks

</details>
